# Map With Radius

> Free online tool to draw radius circles on any map. Enter an address and a distance, and see what falls within your radius. Built on Leaflet and OpenStreetMap. No signup, no API keys, no usage limits, mobile-friendly. Privacy-first — addresses geocoded via Nominatim, no location data sent to our servers.

## Tools

- [Radius Map](https://mapwithradius.com/): The main radius tool. Draw a circle by address and distance (miles or kilometers). Supports URL parameters: `?lat=X&lng=Y&r=10mi&locate=true`. Export KML or PNG.
- [KM Radius Map](https://mapwithradius.com/km-radius-map): Same tool with kilometers as the default unit. Targeted at metric users (Europe, Australia, Asia).
- [Drive Time Map](https://mapwithradius.com/drive-time-map): Isochrone map. Shows how far you can actually travel by car, foot, or bike within a time limit, using real road networks (OSRM/Valhalla routing).
- [Walking & Cycling Radius Map](https://mapwithradius.com/walking-radius-map): Pedestrian and cyclist isochrone. Useful for 15-minute-city analysis and walkability planning.
- [Distance Calculator](https://mapwithradius.com/distance-calculator): Measure straight-line ("as the crow flies") and road distance between two points on a map.
- [Zip Code Radius Map](https://mapwithradius.com/zip-code-radius): Enter a zip code and a distance; returns all zip codes within that radius. Exportable as CSV.
- [Geofence Map Tool](https://mapwithradius.com/geofence-map): Plan a radius-based geofence boundary. Export as KML for use in geofencing platforms.

## Guides

- [How to Draw a Radius on Google Maps](https://mapwithradius.com/radius-on-google-maps): Google Maps has no built-in radius tool. Three workarounds (My Maps, third-party extensions, this tool) plus a comparison.
- [Map & Radius Glossary](https://mapwithradius.com/glossary): Plain-English definitions of 40+ terms — radius, isochrone, geofence, geocoding, KML, WGS 84, Mercator, Haversine formula, and more.
- [Radius Map Use Cases](https://mapwithradius.com/use-cases): Concrete examples of how real estate agents, delivery teams, retailers, event planners, marketers, and sales managers use radius maps. Common pitfalls and tool recommendations.

## Comparisons

- [Radius Map Tool Alternatives Compared](https://mapwithradius.com/alternatives): Side-by-side comparison of FreeMapTools, MapDevelopers, CalcMaps, Smappen, Maptive, and Map With Radius. Pricing, features, fit by use case.
- [FreeMapTools Alternative](https://mapwithradius.com/alternatives/freemaptools)
- [MapDevelopers Alternative](https://mapwithradius.com/alternatives/mapdevelopers)
- [CalcMaps Alternative](https://mapwithradius.com/alternatives/calcmaps)
- [Smappen Alternative](https://mapwithradius.com/alternatives/smappen)
- [Maptive Alternative](https://mapwithradius.com/alternatives/maptive)

## About

- [About](https://mapwithradius.com/about): Mission, tool lineup, tech stack (Leaflet, OpenStreetMap, Nominatim), accuracy notes.
- [Contact](https://mapwithradius.com/contact): Bug reports, feature requests, business inquiries.
- [Privacy](https://mapwithradius.com/privacy): No accounts, no tracking, no location data sent to servers. GDPR and CCPA compliant.
- [Terms](https://mapwithradius.com/terms): Acceptable use, accuracy disclaimer, OpenStreetMap attribution.

## Tech stack

Built with Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Leaflet for maps, OpenStreetMap tiles, Nominatim for geocoding, OSRM/Valhalla for routing/isochrones. Deployed on Vercel.
